original_instruction:
Determine if sermon context contains biblical content worthy of verse display.

This is a FAST first-pass filter to avoid expensive searches on unsuitable content.

SKIP (contains_verses=False) when:
- Administrative announcements (schedules, logistics, offering instructions)
- Vague/ambiguous language lacking concrete theological content
- Transitional filler ("Let me think...", "Where was I?")
- Repetitive content (same verse already queued or recently displayed)

RETRIEVE (contains_verses=True) when:
- Direct verse citations (e.g., "As Matthew 6:27 says...")
- Biblical narratives or character stories
- Theological concepts that map to specific scripture
- Teaching about biblical principles

Consider timing context:
- Topics just introduced (recent timestamp) = higher confidence
- Same topic as recent verses = lower confidence (avoid repetition)
- Verses already in queue should not be detected again
